## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content publishing, workflow improvements, and performance tracking for their SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manual publishing process currently in place; automation improvements needed for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Content review revealed issues with incorrect links and competitor mentions; refinement of guidelines required](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Balance needed between image quantity and page speed; testing different approaches recommended](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Establishing performance tracking metrics and reporting process for newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Currently publishing manually due to CMS integration challenges](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Need for automation to improve efficiency, especially for Spanish versions](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Lucero (content team member) can assist with transferring content from staging to production](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Exploring ways to optimize the publishing process, including paragraph formatting](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Content Review and Refinement

  - [Incorrect links discovered, particularly in Spanish versions (404 errors)](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Need to avoid mentioning competitors or linking to their sites](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a list of negative keywords and competitor websites to exclude](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Importance of adding unique elements (e.g., photos, tips) to differentiate content from AI-generated material](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Image Strategy for Articles

  - [Current approach: 14 images per article](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Concerns about impact on page speed with high image count](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Proposal to start with minimum photos and add more later](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Suggestion to use SEO testing tool to measure impact of image quantity on performance](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)

### Performance Tracking and Reporting

  - [Initial focus on impressions, clicks, and queries for newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Google Search Console data as primary source in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [More comprehensive analysis possible as more data becomes available (around mid-month 3)](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Importance of quick publishing to gather data and refine strategy](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

### Slack Notification Settings

  - [Assistance provided to set up email notifications for Slack messages](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Instructions given on how to manage multiple Slack workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Move content publishing to production environment](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Create list of negative keywords and competitor websites to exclude from content](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Establish minimum photo count for initial article publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Set up performance tracking for newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Implement email notifications for Slack messages](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review Cancun nightlife article](https://fathom.video/share/qWzTWtempDQfo1z8mozy4PsPadAoa3-9?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
